import React, { useEffect, useState } from 'react'; import './styles/index.css'; function App() { const [theme, setTheme] = useState('light'); useEffect(() => { document.body.className = theme; }, [theme]); const toggleTheme = () => { setTheme((prevTheme) => (prevTheme === 'light' ? 'dark' : 'light')); }; return (
{/* Hero Section */}

Bilal Ahmed

Software Engineer | Frontend Developer | Problem Solver

{/* About Section */}

About Me

I am an experienced Software Engineer with a passion for creating beautiful, responsive, and user-friendly web applications. Skilled in Python, C++, JavaScript, and React, I am dedicated to delivering high-quality solutions that meet client needs.

{/* Projects Section */}

Projects

Advance Attendance System

A PHP-based system for managing attendance records efficiently. Includes features like student registration, attendance tracking and reporting with a stylish UI and responsive layout. Built with HTML, CSS, Pythonand JavaScript.

University Challan Generator

A system to dynamically generate student fee challans. Developed using PHP, MySQL, HTML, and CSS.

Bakery Management System

A web app for managing bakery products, orders, and stock. Built with PHP, MySQL, and JavaScript.

Swift Converter

A multi-functional web app for file conversions (PDF ↔ Word/Image, Image ↔ Text, etc.). Built with HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and PHP.

{/* Skills Section */}

Skills

Python C++ JavaScript React HTML CSS PHP MySQL
